items.title: Overseas Exchange Assets
items.description: You hold crypto assets on exchanges like Binance, Bybit, or OKX

items.title: Assets Over 500M KRW
items.description: Your total overseas financial assets exceeded 500M KRW at any point last year

items.title: Spread Across Exchanges
items.description: Assets are scattered across multiple exchanges, making totals hard to track

items.title: Currency Conversion
items.description: Complex USD/USDT exchange rates make it hard to know exact KRW amounts

items.title: Never Filed Before
items.description: You have never reported overseas financial assets to the tax office

diagnosis.conclusion: If any of these apply, it's time to check now

items.question: How do I know if I need to report?
items.answer: If your combined overseas financial account balances exceed 500 million KRW as of June 1st each year, you are required to report. Link your exchanges on ZKAP to check automatically.

items.question: Which exchanges are supported?
items.answer: We currently support Binance, Bybit, OKX, and Coinbase.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: The app download, exchange linking, and asset viewing are free. Tax filing service fees are provided separately.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: ZKAP applies financial-grade encryption. Collected data is used solely for tax reporting purposes.

items.question: When is the reporting deadline?
items.answer: Overseas financial account reporting is from June 1 to June 30 each year. Failure to report within the deadline results in penalties.
